variants.name: 破坏者
variants.ability: 每个白天，如果你首次在提名中投票，此次投票无效。如果小于等于4名玩家存活，你失去此能力。
variants.flavor: Cheap rope. Low thread-count, easily tampered with. It's a surprise anyone dies by hanging around here.

variants.name: 破坏者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名存活玩家：他随时可能死亡。恶魔会得知你是谁，以及你在夜晚选择了谁。
variants.firstNightReminder: 向恶魔展示破坏者的角色标记，并指向破坏者玩家。
variants.otherNightReminder: 让破坏者指向一名存活玩家。标记玩家“倒计时”，该玩家随时可能死亡。向恶魔展示“倒计时”提示标记，然后指向被标记的玩家。
variants.flavor: Green wire to red? Or is it green to black? And the clock doesn't seem to ever read the right time... Oh well! Who doesn't love surprises?

variants.name: 破坏者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家和两个角色：如果他明天白天'疯狂'证明你选择的两个角色或破坏者在场，他可能会被处决。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake the Saboteur. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Saboteur's MAD reminder. Then, put the Saboteur to sleep. Wake the Saboteur's target & notify them that they have been selected, and point to the two characters that the Saboteur selected on their character sheet. Then, put that player to sleep.
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Saboteur. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Saboteur's MAD reminder. Then, put the Saboteur to sleep. Wake the Saboteur's target & notify them that they have been selected, and point to the two characters that the Saboteur selected on their character sheet. Then, put that player to sleep.
variants.flavor: Knock out the base, and everything comes crumbling down.
